title: alyssum calycinum var. granatense
intro: Alyssum calycinum var. granatense, also known as Granatense Creeping Alyssum, is a low-growing, spreading perennial herb belonging to the mustard family (Brassicaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, and is believed to have a positive effect on the immune system and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Alyssum calycinum var. granatense include reducing inflammation and fighting off infections, as well as exhibiting antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat colds, coughs, and bronchitis.
